adaptive_rule.aggregate_damage_estimate: mean adversarial total cost minus mean clean total cost over all replicate/trial cells
adaptive_rule.deadband_action: lambda unchanged when EMA damage is within target +/- deadband_fraction
adaptive_rule.ema_initialization: first aggregate damage for each target sequence

batch.construction: first 64 trials from pair.task.validation_trials; the task exposed 72 normal validation trials, so no singleton repetition helper was used

cap_free_contract.epsilon_scale_role: recorded output only, not a guard criterion

command.notes: PYTHONPATH=src avoids stale editable rlrmp imports from sibling worktrees.

lambda_source.source_objective_energy_convention: E_i = sum_t,d delta_epsilon_i,t,d^2 over active mask
